title: Valentine's Day!
excerpt: The gallery is just bursting with love. I decided to put a slightly masculine twist on the layout I made. Love Love Love || Copyright Two Peas In A Bucket For all those who celebrate (and even those who don't)…
body: The gallery is just bursting with love. I decided to put a slightly masculine twist on the layout I made.Love Love Love || Copyright Two Peas In A Bucket For all those who celebrate (and even those who don't) here is a little song for you from the lovely Courtney Jaye. I heard it while on hold with Delta a couple weeks ago and it made my day. Here's Love Song (For Everyone).
